title: Chunqiu Fanlu: Luxuriant Dew of the Spring and Autumn
description: Dong Zhongshu's synthesis of Confucianism with cosmology: Heaven, Earth, and Humanity form a triad.
introduction: Dong Zhongshu's synthesis of Confucianism with cosmology: Heaven, Earth, and Humanity form a triad.

translation.text: Heaven, Earth, and Humanity are the foundation of all things. Heaven gives them life, Earth nourishes them, and Humanity completes them.
